title: Doko Demo Craft
description: Mod that adds the main cast of Doko Demo Issyo as mobs in Minecraft
body:
As a gift to a friend, this mod adds the characters from the Doko Demo Issyo series fo 1.18.2

 
### Adds:
 

• Toro Inuoe

• Kuro

• Jun Mihara

• Pierre Yamamoto

• Ricky

• R. Suzuki

• Sora

 

### Features:
 

They're a neat encounter, not much to it.
